mnemonics: MEDIUM: Model Evaluation, Diagnostics, Interpretation, Understanding, and Metrics
keyPoints: Model evaluation metrics like accuracy, precision, recall, and F1-score are crucial for assessing performance.
Diagnostic tools like learning curves and confusion matrices help identify issues like bias and variance.
Feature importance and partial dependence plots are key for model interpretation and understanding.
commonMistakes: Relying solely on accuracy for model evaluation, especially on imbalanced datasets.
Confusing correlation with causation during model interpretation.
Tuning a model for the test set performance, leading to data leakage and overfitting.
